Nigel Huddleston

Member of Parliament for Droitwich and Evesham

I'm Nigel Huddleston and it's an honour to have been re-elected as your local MP for the new constituency of Droitwich and Evesham (formerly Mid Worcestershire). Here you will find my news, campaigns and more about my work across Droitwich, Evesham and the surrounding villages. I'm here to help, so please don't hesitate to get in touch.

Subscribe to monthly reports

In which of these ways can you help us?
By agreeing to volunteer for us, you also agree to us contacting you about volunteering. For more information, please see our Data Protection and Privacy Policy

The information you provide is used in accordance with our Data Protection and Privacy Policy. By clicking this button you agree to your information being used in accordance with that policy.

Postcode Lottery Reception

17th April 2026
